story.description: A clip of marine life in the ocean: Deep-sea fishing adventure.
story.hook: Ocean shows the eyes before the payoff.
story.lead: This fish steals fish eyes. That’s why it’s called the saber-tooth blenny. Watch its jaw unhinge—those long fangs aren’t for biting. That’s why it sneaks up, plucks an eye, and swims off like nothing happened. So, if you’re a fish, how do you spot this thief before it strikes? That’s why you keep an eye on the eyes.
story.script: This fish steals fish eyes. That’s why it’s called the saber-tooth blenny. Watch its jaw unhinge—those long fangs aren’t for biting. That’s why it sneaks up, plucks an eye, and swims off like nothing happened. So, if you’re a fish, how do you spot this thief before it strikes? That’s why you keep an eye on the eyes.
story.title: Fish that steals fish eyes
